name: Beta-sitosterol
summary: Decision-ready summary: Beta-sitosterol is best framed for BPH urinary symptoms; cholesterol support; safety screen: sitosterolemia; fat-soluble vitamin absorption concerns.
description: Beta-sitosterol supports prostate; cholesterol with moderate-high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v8.2: A multicenter placebo-controlled trial found beta-sitosterol improved BPH symptom score and urinary flow measures.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: A multicenter placebo-controlled trial found beta-sitosterol improved BPH symptom score and urinary flow measures.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 130 mg/day free beta-sitosterol in BPH trial; study-specific dosing matters
